hero.headline: Round 12 scenario composer + precision focus system
hero.subheadline: Adaptive density, focus radius, safe dock orchestration and scenario presets for the calmest enterprise schema canvas yet.
hero.promise: Keep dense topology presentation-safe without hiding technical truth.

presets.label: Executive
presets.detail: High-signal review for CAB, executive walkthroughs and release approval boards.

presets.label: Topology
presets.detail: Balanced structural reading for cross-domain schema architecture.

presets.label: Governance
presets.detail: Approval, policy, RLS and stewardship surfaces rise to the front.

presets.label: Traceability
presets.detail: Lot, serial, genealogy and quality-loop reading for manufacturing audits.

presets.label: Runtime
presets.detail: Workflow-facing schema paths for forms, APIs and module-builder delivery.

presets.label: Calm review
presets.detail: Mute non-essential canvas noise and keep the current selection story readable.

densityModes.label: Auto
densityModes.detail: Derive density from zoom band and active selection.

densityModes.label: Compact
densityModes.detail: Presentation-safe card footprint with essential facts only.

densityModes.label: Balanced
densityModes.detail: Default studio density for daily architecture work.

densityModes.label: Expanded
densityModes.detail: Selected stories expose more field-level evidence.

radiusModes.label: Selected only
radiusModes.detail: Only the selected node or preset seed stays primary.

radiusModes.label: Two-hop
radiusModes.detail: Broader context for cross-domain impact reading.

dockModes.label: Auto
dockModes.detail: Move the dock away from the active focus when needed.

dockModes.label: Right dock
dockModes.detail: Default detail dock pinned to the right edge.

dockModes.label: Left dock
dockModes.detail: Swap the dock when focus is already on the right.

dockModes.label: Bottom rail
dockModes.detail: Wide horizontal review surface for multi-selection.

dockModes.label: Hidden
dockModes.detail: Canvas-only mode for walkthroughs and screenshots.

labelModes.label: Selection only
labelModes.detail: Only the selected story exposes labels.

labelModes.label: Focus graph
labelModes.detail: Show labels inside the active focus radius.

labelModes.label: Lane signals
labelModes.detail: Expose labels on cross-domain or policy-critical edges.

labelModes.label: All visible
labelModes.detail: Full label mode for deep topology sessions.

reviewRules: Default canvas should stay calm until the user selects a story, lane or preset.
Density should adapt to zoom and focus radius before users need to open inspectors.
Dock placement must avoid obscuring the active focus when auto mode is enabled.
Edge labels should appear only where the current reading task benefits from them.

accessibility.contrast: Keep text/background contrast within WCAG-friendly thresholds and boost contrast in high-contrast mode.
accessibility.focus: Maintain a visible focus halo and avoid obscuring selected objects under overlays.
accessibility.motion: All non-essential transitions can be reduced without losing topology meaning.
